title: Violet
description: Vanilla-like optimizations and some client-side quality of life (QoL) features.
body:
[⚡] Performance

Violet has a ton of mods that will make your experience smoother, and more optimized for your computer.

Visuals

It's weird to say that Violet has better graphics then the base game, but that true! Violet contains ResolutionControl+ which can give a Anti-Aliasing around egdes, which also gives more FPS (atleast on my computer).

Features

Anti-Aliasing, works like DLSS,
OptiFine Resource Packs,
Shader Support,
Connected Textures,
Dynamic Lighting,
OptiFine Zoom. Future
Better Optimization.

Builded with Fabric

Fabric was choosen here to support most of the important mods used in Violet.

Common Questions

That may answer someone. ---

Q: How to play?

A: You can use the Modrinth App, or read the documentation about playing the ModPack in third party programs.

Q: Can I play with it on a server?

A: Yes.

Q: How optimized is it?

A: See the table under to find out!
NameFPS
Vanilla70 +/-
Violet400 +/-
Tested on Nvidia RTX 3050 card, so the table may be unaccurate.
